T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 63 

PR_VRSN 

LABEL: Provider File Version Representing the Iteration of the File 

DESCRIPTION: Indicator representing the iteration of the file. 

SHORT NAME: PR_VRSN 

LONG NAME: PR_VRSN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: A two-character number (“01,” “02,” “03,” etc.)
